summary: EXP-350 delivers a single-patch deep-attack closing ISS-1960 (WIN-014.c7 H7 moderate, verdict-tier taxonomy hybrid). Appends a ~1,027 char closing paragraph to WIN-014.detail_verdict_text (869 → 1,896 chars) that (a) acknowledges the taxonomist's strongest critique — the underlying logical structure here IS structurally self-contradictory because κ + dome-cited ΔB + dome-cited SG null all come from the dome and force a contradiction by dome arithmetic alone, (b) defends 'Refuted by Data' classification on the grounds that the load-bearing premise (SG measurement of 0 µGal across the network) is an empirical observation the dome itself accepts as validating data on its own claim, not a dome-derivation step, (c) names the WIN-012 vs WIN-013/WIN-014 verdict-tier asymmetry: WIN-012 stays Self-Contradicted because no external data step is required; WIN-013/WIN-014 are Refuted by Data because each requires loading the corresponding empirical eclipse measurement. The verdict-tier reframe (Self-Contradicted → Refuted by Data) was operator-commissioned (HNOTE-OPERATOR-WIN-013-014-VERDICT-REFRAME-001, EXP-301) — this EXP defends, not relitigates. WIN-013 carries the parallel concern (also no taxonomy explainer in its detail_verdict_text; verified by inspection); summary_for_decider recommends a sibling EXP or follow-up ISS for WIN-013's matching paragraph but does NOT expand scope. review_class=deep-attack per PROP-025 (new structural argument introduced + defender-pivot with previously-absent cross-reference). Verdict (Refuted by Data) unchanged; no numeric data values modified; tests/run.sh should pass unchanged.
